Name: Getting Started with Competitive Programming
description: Successfully completed the NPTEL Getting Started with Competitive Programming course with a solid score of 76%. Developed strong skills in algorithms, problem-solving, and optimizing code performance.

description: Completed an introductory course on Reinforcement Learning, gaining hands-on experience with reward-based learning algorithms. Built foundational knowledge for applying RL in practical scenarios.

description: Learned core concepts of entrepreneurship, including business planning and market analysis. Developed skills to ideate and evaluate startup opportunities effectively.

description: Completed IBM's Data Science course, covering Python, data visualization, and machine learning fundamentals. Gained practical skills for real-world data analysis projects.

Description: Worked on an innovative engineering solution focusing on automation and AI integration in manufacturing systems.

description: Learned the basics of MongoDB, including document storage, queries, and data modeling. Applied knowledge by creating simple databases and performing CRUD operations.

Name: Learnathon 2024
description: Completed multiple learning modules from Microsoft, Bentley, Celonis, Google Developers, MathWorks, MongoDB, Qlik, UiPath, Wadhwani Foundation, and AWS Academy. This program demonstrates consistent engagement with a wide variety of technology platforms.

description: Learned key concepts of machine learning using Python, including regression, classification, and data preprocessing. Built small projects to apply algorithms on real datasets.

Name: Cloud Computing Premier
description: Explored advanced concepts of cloud computing, including distributed systems and deployment strategies. Developed understanding of cloud-based applications and infrastructure management.
